items.headline: BofA Securities Adjusts Price Target on Albemarle to $155 From $225, Maintains Buy Rating
items.snippet: 08:14 AM EDT, 07/17/2026 (MT Newswires) -- Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $207.56, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: Albemarle Stock Loses 25% in a Month: What Should Investors Do Now?
items.snippet: ALB shares tumbled 25.5% in the past month, underperforming Zacks Chemical - Diversified industry and S&P 500. Falling lithium prices weighing on stock amid slowing China EV demand, inventory glut, and mine restarts (CATL Jianxiawo, Mineral Resources Bald Hill).
